text:
(01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: A monthly flag indicating if the beneficiary is enrolled in Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) 
administered via the Social Security Administration (SSA). There are separate variables for each of the 
12 months during the year. 

SHORT NAME: SSDI_IND_01 
SSDI_IND_02 
SSDI_IND_03 
SSDI_IND_04 
SSDI_IND_05 
SSDI_IND_06 
 SSDI_IND_07 
SSDI_IND_08 
SSDI_IND_09 
SSDI_IND_10 
SSDI_IND_11 
SSDI_IND_12 

LONG NAME: SSDI_IND_01 
SSDI_IND_02 
SSDI_IND_03 
SSDI_IND_04
